data.name: Sex Adventures - Office Affairs
data.detailed_description:
About the game

An erotic visual novel about the workplace sexual relationship between two women. Everything takes a turn when they are caught by their colleagues.

Visual Novel Description

Ann is a beautiful and smart girl who has just been hired at a successful company.
She feels a little lost on her first day, but Beth takes her under her wing and answers all her questions.
A little later, she also gets to know her colleagues from the technical department who are obviously drooling over her.
Ann is impatient to start her duties and asks Beth to accompany her to make some copies for the staff meeting.
On their way to the copy room, Beth stops Ann in the hallway and starts hitting on her out of the blue.
What will be her reaction to this indecent proposal?
Let’s find out together in this erotic visual novel.

Features

- 50+ HD renders
- Animations

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
